intro: In a sunlit clearing, an enormous Grass-type dozes among the flowers. It is calm, unbothered, and far larger than any you have seen of its kind.
title: The Gentle Giant
description: A huge, docile Grass Pokemon naps in a clearing. Approach to battle it - weaken it and you can throw a Ball to add it to your team - or leave it to its rest.

1.label: Approach it
1.tooltip: (+) Battle the giant - weaken it, then catch it with a Ball
1.selected: You step into the clearing, and the great Pokemon stirs awake to face you...

2.label: Leave it be
2.selected: You back out of the clearing and leave the gentle giant to its nap.
